4625.description: Failed logon events may indicate password guessing or brute-force attempts.
recommended_queries: index=main EventCode=4625 | stats count by Account_Name, src_ip
defensive_actions: Block suspicious source IP if repeated.

4798.description: Local group membership enumeration may indicate account or privilege discovery.
recommended_queries: index=main EventCode=4798 | stats count by Account_Name, ComputerName
index=main EventCode=4798 OR EventCode=4799 OR EventCode=4688
defensive_actions: Review process name and parent process.

4688.description: Process creation can indicate script or command execution.
recommended_queries: index=main EventCode=4688 | stats count by New_Process_Name, Creator_Process_Name
index=main EventCode=4688 powershell OR cmd OR wscript OR cscript

4672.description: Special privileges assigned to new logon may indicate privileged account use.
recommended_queries: index=main EventCode=4672 | stats count by Account_Name, ComputerName
defensive_actions: Validate whether account should have admin privileges.
Confirm change ticket or admin activity.

7045.description: New service installation may indicate persistence.
recommended_queries: index=main EventCode=7045 | table _time host Service_Name Service_File_Name Account_Name

1102.description: Security log cleared may indicate attempt to hide activity.

5857.description: Windows WMI activity was observed. Review process/user context to determine if it is expected administration or suspicious WMI usage.
recommended_queries: index=* source="WinEventLog:Microsoft-Windows-WMI-Activity/Operational" EventCode=5857 | stats count by host, ComputerName
index=* (EventCode=5857 OR EventCode=5861) | table _time host ComputerName User ProcessId
defensive_actions: Validate whether WMI activity is expected.
Review host, user, and process context.
Correlate with process creation events such as EventCode 4688.
Check for remote WMI execution from unusual hosts.
